name: Yang Xiao Long \\ A long trip to Argus
description:
"Something told me you might miss me and I was pretty bored anyways, so I came by."

Yang was waiting along with everyone else for the train to Argus to depart, however, she was pretty bored herself. Yang thought about it and decided that she might as well spend this time with her partner she got with during her depressive state after the Fall of Beacon and board the train a little early.

Second Yang bot in a row, woohoo! I sure hope Jack finally notices me.

All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
